expectations.text: Hero contains an animated visual specific to focus/blocking (tabs being X'd out, timer animation)
expectations.evidence: 6 .tab elements with @keyframes tabblock animation fading out; timer-box with live JS countdown and progress-fill animation

expectations.text: Page uses dark background (#0d0d0d or similar)
Uses cyan or blue accent color appropriate for tech/SaaS
expectations.evidence: #06b6d4 cyan accent throughout — nav CTA, buttons, stat numbers, timer border

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer

expectations.evidence: No generic phrases; headline is punchy and audience-specific ('doom-scrolling' is exact pain language)

expectations.text: Stats section with at least 3 social proof numbers
Feature grid with at least 4 cards
Final CTA with email input and button
expectations.evidence: cta-section with email input and 'Start My Free Trial' button

expectations.text: A countdown/focus timer is present and animated or functional
expectations.evidence: Live JS countdown timer (setInterval decrementing from 25:00) plus CSS progress bar animation
@keyframes tabblock, progress defined; tab blocking and progress bar animated
